description: Generic GeoSciML Basic FeatureCollection wrapper: combines json-fg/featurecollection.json with `features[]` items validated by geosciml_basic_feature.json (which dispatches each item to the right $anchor in geoscimlBasic.json via featureType). Use this with any standards-compliant JSON Schema 2020-12 validator. The companion schema geosciml_basic_featurecollection.json (no underscore) is the OGC team's ShapeChange-generated version which performs the same dispatch inline.
